title: cassia formosa
intro: Cassia formosa, also known as the Golden Shower Tree or Yellow Cassia, is a flowering tree native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Cassia formosa is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
